cases.input: Extract reusable insight from a Socratic debate about branch-per-skill workflow.
cases.expected_behavior: Captures answer, refinements, gaps, prior insight search, insight candidate, update plan, and evidence.

cases.input: Capture a discovery about validation scripts needing offline fixtures.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates an insight candidate with domain, reusable pattern, trigger, anchor, and target update file.

cases.input: Three debates hit the same ambiguity about when to pause before merge.
cases.expected_behavior: Proposes amendment candidate with recurrence count, rationale, and ADR path.

cases.input: One isolated disagreement appears in a debate.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks amendment proposal and records a tentative insight or gap.

cases.input: Create a new active insight identical to an existing active insight.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects duplicate and requires refine, supersede, or no-op.

cases.input: Add an insight without checking existing insight files.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks report because prior insight search is missing.

cases.input: Summarize debate without answer, refined question, or coverage gaps.
Write insight update outside insights/ or .specify/adr/.
Teach me the history of reinforcement learning.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate because no project debate/discovery capture is requested.

cases.input: Validate continuous learning JSON fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accepts valid learning reports and rejects missing prior search, missing outputs, duplicate insights, weak amendment, and unsafe update path.
